essence: Maintains outdoor grounds, sports fields, and estates through steady care, practical skill, and seasonal awareness.

identity.title: Groundskeeper
identity.summary: Looks after outdoor areas such as parks, estates, school grounds, and sports fields by mowing, planting, repairing surfaces, and keeping landscapes safe and tidy.

salary.notes: Specialist sports‑turf roles, estate grounds management, and senior positions can exceed £35k-£45k+ depending on scale and expertise.

qualifications: Knowledge of plants, soil, and seasonal care
Experience with mowers, trimmers, and grounds machinery
Understanding of health and safety procedures

lifestyle.description: Groundskeepers work outdoors year‑round, maintaining parks, school grounds, sports pitches, and estates. Days involve mowing lawns, trimming hedges, planting shrubs, repairing pathways, clearing leaves, and preparing sports surfaces. The work is physical and heavily influenced by weather and seasons, requiring steady effort and practical problem‑solving. Many roles involve early starts and a mix of routine tasks and seasonal projects. This lifestyle suits individuals who enjoy nature, hands‑on work, and seeing the visible results of their care over time.

habits: Plans tasks around weather and seasons
Keeps grounds tidy and safe for public use
Works steadily through physical outdoor tasks
